news_items.title: Local election results
news_items.description: Residents across Hull took to the polling stations on Thursday 7 May for this year’s local elections. One seat each in 19 out of Hull’s 21 wards was up for election, whilst Ings and Kingswood wards do not have local elections this year.

news_items.title: Stronger rights for private renters
news_items.description: Private renters in Hull, and across the country, are to benefit from enhanced rights, which came into force on Friday 1 May. Find out more about the new Renters’ Rights Act and seek advice if your new tenancy rights are being affected.

news_items.title: Hull Local Plan
news_items.description: Following Government changes to the planning system, the Council has published a revised timetable for production of the new Hull Local Plan. We will be holding our next public consultation in July.

news_items.title: Financial help and support
news_items.description: With so many forms, rules and systems it can be difficult to know where to begin, but there is free, confidential advice available which is easily accessed and can help make a difference.
